scripts.test: npm run test:content && npm run test:engine && npm run test:assets && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:assets: python3 tools/validate_character_sprites.py && node --check phaser-game.js && node --check phaser-content.js && node --check game-engine/runtime.js && node --check game-engine/phaser-bridge.js
scripts.test:browser: npm run test:browser:base && npm run test:browser:bond
